title: pimpinella ledermannii subsp. engleriana
intro: Pimpinella ledermannii subsp. engleriana, commonly known as Pimpinella engleriana, is a plant species within the parsley family (Apiaceae) that is native to certain regions in West Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pimpinella ledermannii subsp. engleriana include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or decoction, or used in combination with other herbs in herbal preparations to treat various health conditions.
